snippet.title: মা গো তোমার সাথে কত ঝগড়া | Moyaj Ali | Nasheed Film
snippet.description:
মা গো তোমার সাথে কত ঝগড়া | Moyaj Ali | Nasheed Film

মা গো তোমার সাথে কত ঝগড়া ইসলামিক গজলটি আমাদের সেরা সৃষ্টিগুলোর একটি। মোয়াজ আলী এর সুমধুর কন্ঠে এই গানটি শুনুন ও ভালোলাগার মধ্যে হারিয়ে যান। 

গানটির লিরিক্স ও সুর এমনভাবে তৈরি করা হয়েছে যা আপনার হৃদয় ছুঁয়ে যাবে। নাশিদ ফিল্ম এর গুণগত মানসম্পন্ন ভিডিও নির্মাণ ও সাউন্ড ডিজাইন আপনার পছন্দের তালিকাতে জায়গা করে নিবে।

আপনি যদি আপনার আশেপাশে প্রতিভাবান ইসলামিক সংগীতশিল্পী বাচ্চাদের চেনেন, তাহলে আমাদের সাথে যোগাযোগ করুন। আমরা তাদের প্রতিভা তুলে ধরতে সহযোগিতা করতে চাই।

আমাদের আরও বেশ কিছু জনপ্রিয় গজল শুনতে লিঙ্কটি চেক করুন। নতুন গজল পেতে চ্যানেলটি সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন ও ভিডিওটি শেয়ার করতে ভুলবেন না।

snippet.title: Countries Decide Who Wins $25,000
snippet.description:
I can’t believe who they chose

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

New Merch - https://mrbeast.store
Join our discord server for your chance to compete in future Minecraft challenges!
https://discord.gg/mrbeastgaming

snippet.title: বেশি বলে বুলবুলি ২। Beshi Bole Bulbuli 2 | Trailer | Tawsif Mahbub | Totini | New Bangla Natok 2026
snippet.description:
“Beshi Bole Bulbuli 2” is a fun, witty, and light-hearted Bangla drama that explores what happens when words become a little too much. Starring the ever-charming Tawsif Mahbub and the expressive Totini, this trailer teases a story where one talkative heart meets another that’s not ready to listen — or is it?

Directed by Rubel Hasan, this CMV-backed natok brings humor, emotion, and quirky chaos all in one frame. With witty dialogue and unforgettable characters, this CMV production proves that even those who talk too much might just be the ones who feel the most.

🎭 A drama where every word counts—and some count a little too much!

🎭 Cast & Crew:
Cast: Tawsif Mahbub, Totini, Saberi Alam, Masum Basar, Mili Bashar
Producer: SK Shahed Ali Pappu
Script: Mezbha Uddin Sumon
Direction: Rubel Hasan
DOP: Nazmul Hasan
Edit & Color: Agun Suvo
Background Music: Sojib
Production: Central Music and Video (CMV)
CMV is a Bangladeshi record label. The company was founded in 2003 by Sk. Shahed Ali (also known as Pappu). It is a producer, distributor, and wholesaler of audio cassettes, CDs, video CDs, and DVDs.

snippet.description:

Show Name: CID Season 2
Episode No : 30
Director: Shachindra Vats, Santosh Shetty
Producer: Deepak Dhar, Rajesh Chadhaa

Cast & Characters: 
• Shivaji Satam as ACP Pradyuman
• Dayanand Shetty as Sr. Inspector Daya 
• Narendra Gupta as Dr. R. P. Salunkhe 
• Aditya Srivastava as Sr. Inspector Abhijeet
• Ajay Nagrath – Inspector Pankaj
• Aditya Srivastava as Sr. Inspector Abhijeet 
• Shraddha Musale as Dr. Tarika 
• Ansha Sayed as Inspector Purvi 
• Parul Rai – CID Officer 
• Saumya Saraswat – CID Officer

About CID:
-----------------
CID Season 2 brings back India’s favourite crime investigation team with new excitement and fresh cases. ACP Pradyuman leads the team with confidence, while Daya and Abhijeet return to solve difficult and shocking crimes. The officers carefully search for small clues, question suspects and use smart investigation skills to find the truth. Dr. Salunkhe supports them with forensic reports and scientific evidence. Season 2 includes new twists, modern crime methods and intense action scenes that keep viewers interested. It connects old memories with new stories, making it enjoyable for both long-time fans and new audiences.

সিআইডি সিজন ২ আবার ফিরিয়ে এনেছে ভারতের প্রিয় অপরাধ তদন্তকারী টিমকে নতুন উত্তেজনা ও নতুন কেস নিয়ে। এসিপি প্রদ্যুমান আত্মবিশ্বাসের সঙ্গে টিমকে নেতৃত্ব দেন, আর দয়া ও অভিজিৎ কঠিন ও চমকপ্রদ অপরাধের তদন্তে নামে। তারা ছোট ছোট সূত্র খুঁজে বের করে, সন্দেহভাজনদের জিজ্ঞাসাবাদ করে এবং বুদ্ধিমত্তার সঙ্গে সত্য উদঘাটন করে। ডা. সালুঙ্কে ফরেনসিক রিপোর্ট ও বৈজ্ঞানিক প্রমাণ দিয়ে টিমকে সাহায্য করেন। সিজন ২-তে রয়েছে নতুন মোড়, আধুনিক তদন্ত পদ্ধতি এবং টানটান অ্যাকশন, যা দর্শকদের শেষ পর্যন্ত ধরে রাখে। পুরনো স্মৃতি ও নতুন গল্পের মিশেলে এই সিজনটি পুরনো ও নতুন—দুই ধরনের দর্শকের কাছেই সমানভাবে উপভোগ্য।

The teaser trailer of the upcoming Bangla movie Rakkhosh (রাক্ষস) starring Siam Ahmed is finally here, and it looks intense, dark, and mysterious. In this video, I share my first reaction and honest review of the teaser, analyzing the visuals, tone, background score, and what it might reveal about the story.

From the teaser, Rakkhosh appears to explore a darker side of storytelling with thriller or horror elements. Siam Ahmed seems to be portraying a complex and intense character, which could become one of the most talked-about roles in his career.

🎬 In this video, you’ll see:

First reaction to the Rakkhosh teaser trailer

Teaser breakdown and hidden details

Siam Ahmed’s character and performance vibe

Cinematography, background music & tone analysis

Expectations from the full movie

If you enjoy Bangla movie teaser reactions, thriller and horror cinema, this video will give you a quick insight into what Rakkhosh (রাক্ষস) might deliver.

snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim

localized.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
localized.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.
